data.content: Shipment complete. Rebased worktree-knots-720e-embed-loom-bundle onto main (2 new commits from knots-040c), fast-forward merged to main. Added missing test-only helper prompt_body_for_state to loom_compat_bundle (commit 2c0a1d23ce9e) to satisfy loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests which call loom_compat_bundle::prompt_body_for_state for all action states including evaluating. All 833 tests pass, sanity green (95.40% coverage), CI green on remote. Commits: 60f357692ea9 (feat: embed builtin compat workflow as Loom bundle), 2c0a1d23ce9e (fix: add test-only prompt_body_for_state).
